title: Exercise 1
statement: You are given an accumulation function a(t) = 1 + 0.1t. An amount of 1000 is invested at time 0. Determine the amount of interest earned during year 8.
solution_steps: Since A(t) = 1000 a(t), we have A(t) = 1000(1 + 0.1t).
The interest earned during year 8 is I8 = A(8) - A(7) = 1800 - 1700 = 100.
generalization: For year n, the interest earned is In = A(n) - A(n-1) = 1000(1 + 0.1n) - 1000(1 + 0.1(n-1)) = 100.
answer_text: The amount of interest earned during year 8 is 100.
